capabilities.name: project.resolve
capabilities.summary: Resolve caller context into a scoped project reference without exposing private channel maps or local paths by default.

capabilities.name: filesystem.read_project_metadata
capabilities.summary: Read approved project metadata files and return structured summaries.

capabilities.name: filesystem.write_project_files
capabilities.summary: Write approved project files after preview, policy gates, and local repo checks.

capabilities.name: git.inspect_status
capabilities.summary: Inspect repository boundary, branch, dirty state, and ahead/behind state.

capabilities.name: git.write_branch
capabilities.summary: Create branches, stage files, commit, or merge only after explicit operation gates.

capabilities.name: incident.read_state
capabilities.summary: Read local incident state and return active/stale/closed summaries.

capabilities.name: incident.write_state
capabilities.summary: Append incident updates, closures, blockers, and follow-up state.

capabilities.name: review.read_state
capabilities.summary: Read local review-session state, comments, decisions, and apply gates.

capabilities.name: review.write_state
capabilities.summary: Record review comments, decisions, approvals, or blockers.

capabilities.name: heartbeat.read_state
capabilities.summary: Read status and heartbeat state needed to decide whether visible progress is due.

capabilities.name: channel.resolve
capabilities.summary: Resolve a caller surface or channel label into a local opaque channel reference.

capabilities.name: remote.resolve
capabilities.summary: Resolve local repository remote metadata without exposing credentials or private account details.

capabilities.name: visible_message.preview
capabilities.summary: Prepare a visible-message summary without sending it.

capabilities.name: visible_message.send
capabilities.summary: Send a visible message only when the operation and local policy allow it.

capabilities.name: approval.request
capabilities.summary: Ask for local human approval when operation gates require it.

capabilities.name: secret.read
capabilities.summary: Read a named local secret only for operations with explicit local authorization.
